declarations.description:
`<andy-accordion>` — collapsible disclosure (`.ds-accordion`).

The panel animates its height open/closed and the chevron rotates. Collapsed
content is `inert` so it stays out of the tab order and the a11y tree.
declarations.name: AndyAccordion

events.name: andy-toggle
events.description: detail is the new open state.

declarations.description:
`<andy-breadcrumb>` — path breadcrumb (`.dp-breadcrumb`).

Provide `items`; the last item renders as the current leaf.
declarations.name: AndyBreadcrumb

members.name: type
members.description: Native button type, useful inside forms.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Native button type, useful inside forms.

declarations.description:
`<andy-footer>` — user card: an `<andy-avatar>` plus a name and email.
Designed for the `<andy-sidebar>` `footer` slot; the text hides when the
sidebar is collapsed.
declarations.name: AndyFooter

members.name: avatar
members.description: Avatar initials (or slot an image into `<andy-avatar>` via `avatar` slot).

attributes.name: avatar
attributes.description: Avatar initials (or slot an image into `<andy-avatar>` via `avatar` slot).

declarations.description:
`<andy-header>` — brand header: a logo mark (`<andy-icon-chip>`) plus a name
and tagline. Designed for the `<andy-sidebar>` `brand` slot; the text hides
when the sidebar is collapsed.
declarations.name: AndyHeader

slots.description: Optional custom logo, used instead of `icon`.
slots.name: logo

members.name: icon
members.description: Built-in icon name for the mark. Ignored when a `logo` is slotted.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Built-in icon name for the mark. Ignored when a `logo` is slotted.

declarations.description:
`<andy-icon-chip>` — gradient-tinted square holding an icon (`.au-icon-chip`).

Set `icon` to a built-in icon name, or slot in your own SVG.
declarations.name: AndyIconChip

slots.description: The icon SVG (used when `icon` is not set).

members.name: icon
members.description: Built-in icon name. When set, it's rendered instead of slotted content.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Built-in icon name. When set, it's rendered instead of slotted content.

declarations.description:
`<andy-icon>` — renders a built-in icon from the Andy-UI set (`.au-icon`).

Decorative by default (`aria-hidden`). Provide `label` to expose it as an
image to assistive tech. The same icon names power `<andy-icon-chip icon>`.
declarations.name: AndyIcon

members.name: name
members.description: Icon name from the built-in set.

members.name: label
members.description: Accessible label. When empty the icon is decorative (hidden from AT).

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Icon name from the built-in set.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label. When empty the icon is decorative (hidden from AT).

members.name: error
members.description: Validation message; presence puts the field into the error state.

events.name: andy-input
events.description: On every keystroke; detail is the value.

events.name: andy-change
events.description: On commit (blur/Enter); detail is the value.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Validation message; presence puts the field into the error state.

members.name: masked
members.description: Masked display; defaults to a derived mask of `value`.

attributes.name: masked
attributes.description: Masked display; defaults to a derived mask of `value`.

declarations.description:
`<andy-app-shell>` — sidebar + main-column application layout.

Regions (light-DOM slots):
declarations.name: AndyAppShell

slots.description: The scrolling page content. Listens for `andy-collapse-toggle` from a descendant sidebar and mirrors the collapsed state onto itself so the grid animates between the full and collapsed sidebar widths.

members.name: persistent
members.description: Disable closing on backdrop click / Escape.

attributes.name: persistent
attributes.description: Disable closing on backdrop click / Escape.

members.name: key
members.description: Stable identifier echoed back in the `andy-select` event detail.

attributes.name: key
attributes.description: Stable identifier echoed back in the `andy-select` event detail.

declarations.description:
`<andy-navbar>` — top navigation bar (`.au-navbar`).

A ready-made composition: a breadcrumb on the left, then a search box and a
theme toggle on the right. Child events bubble (`andy-navigate`,
`andy-input`, `andy-theme-change`), so listen for them on the navbar.
declarations.name: AndyNavbar

slots.description: Extra content placed before the theme toggle (buttons, avatar…).
slots.name: actions

members.name: items
members.description: Breadcrumb trail (last item is the current leaf).

members.name: label
members.description: Accessible name for the progress bar.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible name for the progress bar.

declarations.description: `<andy-search-input>` — search box with a leading magnifier icon.
declarations.name: AndySearchInput

declarations.description:
`<andy-select>` — styled native select (`.ds-select`).

Pass options via the `options` property, or project `<option>` children.
declarations.name: AndySelect

declarations.description:
`<andy-sidebar>` — collapsible workspace sidebar (`.sidebar`).

Compose it from Andy-UI components: `<andy-header slot="brand">` for the brand
header, `<andy-nav-section>` / `<andy-nav-item>` for navigation, and
`<andy-footer slot="footer">` for the user card.
declarations.name: AndySidebar

members.name: collapsible
members.description: Show the collapse toggle button in the header.

attributes.name: collapsible
attributes.description: Show the collapse toggle button in the header.

declarations.description: `<andy-skill-card>` — link-style card with icon, title, description and meta.
declarations.name: AndySkillCard

slots.description: Optional custom icon (defaults to a file glyph).
slots.name: icon

declarations.description: `<andy-status>` — status pill with a leading dot.
declarations.name: AndyStatus

declarations.description: `<andy-switch>` — toggle switch (`.ds-switch`) with an optional trailing label.
declarations.name: AndySwitch

slots.description: Optional label text shown beside the switch.

events.name: andy-change
events.description: detail is the new checked state.

declarations.description:
`<andy-table>` — canonical data table (`.ds-table`).

Provide `columns` and `rows`. For rich cells (pills, action buttons) you can
also use the `.ds-table` CSS classes directly — see the docs.
declarations.name: AndyTable

events.name: andy-change
events.description: detail is the selected tab id.

declarations.name: showToast
declarations.description:
Imperatively show a toast. This is the primitive the React `useToast` hook
and the Angular `ToastService` wrap.

declarations.name: toast
declarations.default: { show: showToast, success: (message?: string, opts?: Omit<AndyToastOptions, "type" | "message">) => showToast({ ...opts, type: "success", message }), info: (message?: string, opts?: Omit<AndyToastOptions, "type" | "message">) => showToast({ ...opts, type: "info", message }), warning: (message?: string, opts?: Omit<AndyToastOptions, "type" | "message">) => showToast({ ...opts, type: "warning", message }), error: (message?: string, opts?: Omit<AndyToastOptions, "type" | "message">) => showToast({ ...opts, type: "error", message }), }

declarations.description:
Base class for all Andy-UI elements.

We render into the **light DOM** (not a shadow root) on purpose: the whole
design system is a global stylesheet (`@andy-ui/tokens`) built around global
(often cross-component) class selectors and CSS custom properties driven by
`[data-theme]` on <html>. Light-DOM rendering lets every component reuse that
stylesheet verbatim and theme through the normal cascade — shadow DOM would
scope those selectors away.

Light DOM has no real `<slot>`, yet we still need to project author children
into our rendered chrome (e.g. a button label inside `<button class="btn">`).
We do this **race-free across frameworks** as follows:

  - Lit renders into a dedicated `display:contents` "chrome wrapper" that is a
    child of the host (see createRenderRoot). Because Lit only ever
    touches that wrapper, the host's *other* direct children — the author's
    content — are never clobbered, whenever the framework inserts them.
  - Author children are therefore trivially identifiable: every direct child
    of the host except the wrapper. We relocate them into `display:contents`
    "slot target" spans inside the chrome (see slotTarget), driven by
    a MutationObserver so it works whether children arrive before or after the
    element upgrades/connects (React inserts early; Angular inserts late).
declarations.name: AndyElement
define
declarations.description: Register a custom element once, tolerating duplicate imports / HMR.

declarations.name: iconNames
declarations.description: Every icon name, handy for Storybook controls and iteration.

declarations.name: initTheme
declarations.description: Apply the persisted theme (or `fallback`) to <html>. Call once at startup.
